历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 24,742; in 2023, approximately 26,965; in 2025, approximately 19,363 for the physics category. Over the past three years, it first decreased then increased, with a significant forward shift of about 7,602 places in 2025 compared to 2023, showing a clear rebound. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 19,363. The provincial enrollment plan for the physics category was 8 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 4 in 2025, and increased to 6 in 2026 (plus 2 for medical category, mapped into the physics group by subject classification), an expansion of about 50% compared to 2025, which is significant and is expected to ease competition considerably, though the ranking numbers will increase substantially.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 180th in the 2025 Soft Science China University Rankings and 177th in 2026, showing a slight rise. It is a specialized sports institution with a stable overall level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly concerning school management responses and campus safety (such as the volleyball league final controversy). Douyin popularity ranks 18th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. No obvious admission gaps or discontinuities have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Beijing Sport University was not included in this data source, so specific A-class disciplines cannot be confirmed. However, as the top sports institution in China, sports science is a traditional advantage discipline, strongly attracting sports and related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The physics category enrollment majors mainly include Data Science, Rehabilitation Therapy, and Sports Economics. Among them, Data Science and Big Data Technology belong to the computer category, with high social heat and strong recommendation. Rehabilitation Physical Therapy belongs to the medical technology category, with average popularity. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to approximately 462,767 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, a municipality directly under the central government, and for Sichuan candidates, it is a cross-provincial application. In terms of regional preference, Beijing universities have strong appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 19,363, the competition easing effect from the approximately 50% expansion in the physics category in 2026 (from 4 to 6), the competition intensifying effect from the approximately 15.6% increase in Sichuan candidates, the negative reputation, and the high Douyin heat, it is predicted that the lowest admission ranking for the physics category in 2026 will shift significantly backward compared to 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 25,200, with a range of 24,700–25,700.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 24,700), you can aim for popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 25,700), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 4264, in 2023 approximately 8076, and in 2025 approximately 4956 for history category. The fluctuations over the past three years have been significant. In 2025, it rebounded by about 3120 positions compared to 2023, but still lagged behind 2022 by about 692 positions. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4956. The provincial enrollment plan for history category was 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 6 in 2025, and will increase to 8 in 2026, an expansion of about 33% compared to 2025. This relatively large expansion is expected to ease competition, but the ranking numbers will still increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, showing a slight upward trend. It is a specialized sports institution with a stable overall level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management responses and campus safety (such as controversies in the volleyball league finals). On Douyin, it ranks 18th in overall popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention from applicants. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Beijing Sport University was not included in this data source, so specific A-level disciplines cannot be confirmed. However, as the highest institution for sports in China, sports science is a traditionally strong discipline, attracting strong interest from applicants in sports and related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The history category enrollment majors are mainly in journalism and communication, languages, and management. Among them, journalism and communication majors have seen a clear decline in social popularity (cooling continuously from 2023 to 2024), while language majors are generally met with a wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to approximately 462,767 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, a municipality directly under the central government, and for Sichuan candidates, it is a cross-province application. In terms of regional preference, Beijing universities have strong appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 4956 in 2025, the easing of competition due to a 33% expansion in history category enrollment in 2026 (from 6 to 8), the intensification of competition due to a 15.6% increase in the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province, the negative reputation of the school, and the high Douyin popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for history category in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6000, with a range of 5500 to 6500.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 康复物理治疗属于医学技术类专业，近年来随着健康中国战略推进和康复医学发展，报考热度持续上升。该专业在四川省仅投放2个招生名额，属于极小规模招生，位次波动弹性 较大。北京作为一线城市，对四川考生具有较强的地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续上升趋势及2026年招生计划持平的情况，预计2026年北京体育大学医学类（康复物理治疗）最低录取位次约为28196名，较2025年略有上升。波动区间预计在27 996至28396名之间，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing Sport University's medical category (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in Sichuan Province had a minimum ranking of 24,169 in 2022 (planned 2 students), rising to 24,822 in 2023 (planned 2 students), and further rising to 27,996 in 2025 (planned 2 students). There is no medical enrollment data for 2021 and 2024. The 2026 medical enrollment plan remains at 2 students, unchanged from 2025. From the three-year data, the medical category ranking has been continuously rising, with a cumulative increase of 3,827 places from 2022 to 2025, indicating intensifying competition year by year.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a key construction university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a national Double First-Class construction university. Located in Beijing, it is the highest institution among domestic sports colleges. Although not a 985 university, its 211 and Double First-Class statuses have high recognition nationwide, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Rehabilitation Physical Therapy belongs to the medical technology category. In recent years, with the advancement of the Healthy China strategy and the development of rehabilitation medicine, the popularity of this major has been continuously rising. This major only has 2 enrollment slots in Sichuan Province, making it a very small-scale enrollment with high ranking fluctuation elasticity. As a first-tier city, Beijing has strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous upward trend of historical rankings and the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Beijing Sport University's medical category (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in 2026 will be approximately 28,196, slightly higher than in 2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 27,996 and 28,396. Candidates are advised to plan their volunteer applications reasonably within this range.
